/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -g -D_DEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ispc_texcomp.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libispc_texcomp.so -o libispc_texcomp.so "CMakeFiles/ispc_texcomp.dir/fetchcontent/ispc_texcomp-src/ispc_texcomp/ispc_texcomp.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ispc_texcomp.dir/fetchcontent/ispc_texcomp-src/ispc_texcomp/ispc_texcomp_astc.cpp.o" "_deps/ispc_texcomp-build/kernel.obj" "_deps/ispc_texcomp-build/kernel_sse4.obj" "_deps/ispc_texcomp-build/kernel_avx.obj" "_deps/ispc_texcomp-build/kernel_astc.obj" "_deps/ispc_texcomp-build/kernel_astc_sse4.obj" "_deps/ispc_texcomp-build/kernel_astc_avx.obj"
